Description: It is a tea shop adjacent to a namesake yoga studio,  the crowd is very hip and Gen Z:)  It felt like most people knew each other hanging out after the class. They have a decent (but less than expected) selection of teas for a tea house.

I was in the neighborhood and wanted something warm, I stopped by this cute tea room. I got their mystic mint tea which was comforting and warm. They also have a yoga studio in the back and clothes! Staff is super friendly too
The tast of coffee is so good and the banana bread is so delicious too

I loved the vibes here! super cute cafe with cute tables and atmosphere. the staff members were all very friendly. this place is also a yoga studio so there’s a really nice relaxed vibe i got from everyone there.\n\nI ordered the rose tea and the croissant and i loved both of them! i can’t wait to come again to try more of their tea selection.
Lovely place! Has wifi and clean bathroom. There are a few seats but the place is comfy and cozy and quiet. I spent great time talking with a friend, and the tea was great.

No only is this place a cozy cafe with sweet treats and some housing goods, they have a hidden yoga studio in the back.

Atmosphere: it’s very cozy, casual, quiet. Not many chairs and tables but somehow it never feels crowded. The lighting is welcoming. The barista is friendly. Everyone who sits here seems to be friendly and very quiet. It’s across the street from The Gemma and Bowery Hotel.

Service: fast barista.

Food: They have the typical cafe drinks and foods. I didn’t try anything because the baked goods didn’t seem unique.

I can’t wait to come back to try the yoga.

I was in the neighborhood and found this gem by luck. Great ambiance/environment to get some work done. It’s a small tea shop with about 5-6 tables and each has outlets.

The barista/cashier was very friendly, offer refills with every drink I’ve ordered. I had the jasmine tea and the chai latte. Would def recommend the loose tea rather than chai latte in my opinions.
Will def come by again next time I’m in the neighborhood

This café is so sweet and filled with kind souls. I feel welcomed as soon as I walk in. The quality of their coffee is unparalleled! But- as a yogi, I suggest their VEGAN BONE BROTH! It’s called Bhairava Tea. And I love taking yoga and philosophy classes in their secret back room. What a New York gem!
Cute tea house/workspace with roomy tables and outlets. Wasn’t a huge fan of the oat milk chai though - not a lot of flavor/depth to it, and pretty watery tasting

I really enjoyed the interior and the vibes, I felt very comfortable and i enjoyed relaxing there.

The drink I got was a very watered down and extremely bland chai. I don’t know if that’s how this type of beverage is supposed to taste, but there was absolutely no flavor.

Besides the drink, I think it is a nice place to study and relax, and the staff are pretty nice too.

Adorable spot and smells amazing! reasonably priced and the tables are huge! Worked here for an hour or two and the staff were nice and the tea was great. Never stopped by bc I thought it was mostly a yoga studio, but it’s super cozy and chill.
so peaceful & amazing coffee. a rare cafe where baristas radiate good energy
I loved their (few but) cute tables and ambience; and the masala chai latte is strong, not sweet and overall awesome! The staff there is super friendly as well. Truly a rarity in NYC cafes
Great little place for some excellent tea and conversation.  Staff is really friendly really calm. Just what you need when stepping in out the bustle of the city.
Really nice and chill cafe. The oat milk chai is good. They have a bathroom available for customers in the back too!

BEST almond latte I have ever had! I am a total coffee snob and something about this place is unfathomably special. The combination of lil skips coffee with its amazingly loving team members and the vibe at the Enlightenment studio is other worldly. It is a sparkly rabbit hole of good style, good tastes, macaroons, vegan bone broth, tea, counter culture coffee, suspiciously intelligent baristas, all amidst conversational aroma of how to help people be ultimately happy. The sum is certainly greater than the parts.
Pleasant simple space. They have a few non-caffeinated infusions, but they were kinda weak.

possibly my new favorite cafe in new york. beautiful space, smells wonderful, yoga and meditation in the back, and pat masala chai that is as close as you can get to authentic chai when using oat milk :)
Great hidden GEM opened recently!! This cafe has tasty treats, excellent coffee (oat milk lattes OMG!!) and great staff!  My new hang-out!!  Beautiful decor and cool T's too!!
Ordered iced chamomile tea. It’s great! Nice vibe.

Vegan pumpkin bread is good.
So are the lattes and cappuccinos.
There are somes seats too.

Haven't tried it yet but they have a nice looking collection of loose leaf teas.
Love this cafe and the yoga/ meditation studio! Wonderful community and the best chocolate chip cookies.
best place in all of nyc ! this enlightenment studio is truly life changing. from meditation to yoga to dharma - it’s a must visit.
The chai was amazing, they use fresh ginger and grind the spices right in front of you. Also ham and cheese croissant was yummy
The most beautiful cafe/meditation and yoga center I’ve been to! I found my community at 3 Jewels and always feel belonged every time I am there. ✨✨🙏🏼🌞 …
Outlets available and they have 2 clean bathrooms in the back with the yoga/meditation room. Loose leaf teas are glorious.

Walked by in a freezing cold windy afternoon and found this cute little Cafe. Later realized it’s the store front of a Yoga and meditation studio where people come in and go.\n\nHad an interesting CORTACCINO, which is cortado meets cappuccino!!
They're experts in tea but honestly this place is amazing because of how quiet it is, they have a bathroom, wifi, and charging outlets! Great place to work from.
horrible service. i waited 30 min for an iced tea with a fly in it. the baristas were amateur and the tea tasted whatever
A great place to get some work done (if you get one of the 4-5 tables). And La Cabra pastries!
Love this spot for meditation and yoga beautiful and calming with quality teachers. The cafe is great too!!
the yoga class was so great
Love the vibe, the rose gold mirror wall and the almond milk lattes! Emmett and Adam are the coolest :)
Stumbled upon the place trying to escape the rain. If I lived in NYC I'd be here every day for coffee and yoga for sure.
Best space ON Earth

Best Cafe in town ⭐️

Owner made a custom made croissant for me with some veggies as i am a vegetarian

Going extra mile for customer is absolutely amazing 👌

And David Coffee is a must Try 🙌

Love the quotes around the store ✨

I'm lucky to have found this place as it will definitely be my new coffee, latte, breakfast, and empanada place whenever I am in the area! The empanadas are what brought us to this place and they are out of this world delicious - easily the best I've ever had. So much so that we went back three days in a row so I could take some home to Philly with me. We've had all three kinds of empanadas and they are all good.\n\nWe tried the coffee and being a chai lover, we went with the \David\" which has 3 shots of expresso and chai and it was absolutely the best. Woke us right up
rating: which is what we needed! We've also tried the 'deluxe' coffee place right next door and honestly Cafe La Fe's lattes were better AND less expensive - the La Colombe coffee she uses is delicious.\n\nThe owner is a sweetheart and you can tell wants to make her customers happy and innovate new ideas of things to offer. She is a talented cook (as evidence by these awesome empanadas) and can't wait to see what she comes with next!"

Description: Delicious arepas and empanadas that are great for a pick me up or a meal!! I got the chicken empanada which came with a sauce and the beef and cheese arepa that also came with a tomato avocado one. Really nice employees too and was so surprised they have La Colombe coffee! Def going back for a draft latte

Such a great coffee spot! I’ve been in a couple of times, the espresso drinks are great, the owner is wonderful, and the empanadas are a big big thumbs up. On scale with NYC pricing and she does have La Colombe!

Incredible hospitality in this tiny gem next to the lazy llama - blink and you’ll miss it so look out for their “empanada” banner out front.

Absolutely delicious BAKED empanadas so they’re not greasy and come with a tasty dipping sauce.

If you run into the owner’s little son, make sure you have a conversation with this precocious child!

Cafe La Fe serves a variety of coffee drinks, juices, and savory eats. fairly new spot to the neighborhood. stopped by bc i wanted a snack for a long walk. ordered a chicken empanada which is ample but priced accordingly. the chicken filling was seasoned well and hit the spot as it was just the right amount of food. definitely glad i stopped for an empanada as opposed to just grabbing a bag of chips or candy. the interior is clean and pleasant—with a little bit of space of seating. service was fast and pleasant.
Had a wonderful experience here! Got the chicken empanadas and they were delicious. Oatmilk latte was perfect! Will be coming back more :)
Amazing Empanadas, best horchata I've EVER had. As well as learning how to throw cards. Thank you for being so amazing
Amazing coffee, amazing empanadas, cute atmosphere and incredible service. Love it here :)

This place deserves more hype! I stopped in to check them out and left with their chicken and beef empanadas. SO. GOOD. You can tell the ingredients are fresh. Also, the woman working there was so warm and lovely, I can’t recommend enough!

Best Empanadas in the city!!
Excellent coffee,delicious food at affordable prices
& friendly staff
You can’t go wrong visiting Cafe La Fe

Stopped in on my way home for an empanada. The owner was the sweetest human being and the empanada was absolutely delicious. My friend bought the homemade lime juice which tasted amazing as well. The service is by far the best part, which is a great feat since the food was so excellent

It’s terrible Cristian place. I try find one coffe and go to this place for one empanada. Smell like chlorine and put Cristian music so high don’t  go to one coffe looking one church just I try find a good coffe experience  no recoment  I don’t understand why this place are in the village.

Stopped by to try out the empanadas, I got the chicken and the beef, both flavors I tried were delicious and the woman who served me was incredibly helpful and welcoming! Will definitely be back to try out the arepas and the coffee/juices.
This shop represents the best mix of the traditional and new LES and the coffee is great. Highly recommend.
Fantastic empanadas and soup. Heard they do breakfast also. Can't recommend highly enough. Lovely staff. Great place to stop in for a bite or take out.
Empanadas are delicious and the owner is so kind and friendly.
Best empanadas and super great environment. Lady is so nice.
Amazing empanadas with even better coffee. Make your morning better and stop in to treat yourself!
Best empanadas in the city!!! Great food. Cute space and the people that work there are super friendly and accommodating.
Empanadas are a must try and the sauce they come with is so good!
Great new neighborhood spot! Excellent coffee, friendly people, cozy relaxing place to take a break. Very positive vibe, soothing music, uplifting messages on the walls. Check them out!
Came in on a rainy day to have a pick me and the miss at the counter was so sweet. The empandas were amazing! You should try one. Coffee is good too!
It's a very nice Cafe. Yes, it's small but it feels homey too. Personally it sends me back to a time where I had nothing to worry about.
Wife and I came in and the barista was a huge help taking time to explain all that they offered. Great service and great coffee to match.
Best empanada I’ve had in the city hands down. Great food and very kind!
excellent coffee and very good service god bless
Chicken empanada was really good
clean, food was great, felt very comfortable. The beverages were great as well 10/10, definitely must come again
$19 for two coffees after tax and tip. Ordered two coffees and the barista just assumed two large ones.
Delicious spot run by the kindest family. Highly recommend!
Amazing empanadas and super sweet staff!
Very community oriented and PHENOMENAL coffee/empanadas. You must come here!
Great Empanadas!
This place is not a Wendy’s.
Amazing chicken empanadas 🤩
Excellent service 👏
Best empanada in NYC
Cozy with good food and service
Beautiful

One of the best shops in New York! We went every day for our morning coffee as it was the only coffee we liked! Also the owner was wonderful, she made you feel at home and we thank her very much!!! Good job because it's worth it!!!
The best coffee and the best empanadas.

No Desc.

My friends and I so enjoyed our time so much so that I needed to remind them quite a few times we really needed to make our way out the door for closing lol. The staff were so hospitable, friendly and attentive. They really went above and beyond to make the night perfect for us. Food and drinks were amazing Cam is really helpful and kind. Together we came up with a menu and even a signature drink for the evening. I also really loved that the staff allowed me to play my own music which was a lot of fun for us too! Looking forward to hosting another event here in the future and I highly recommend to anyone!

The friendliest staff and the best happy hour, hands down! Victor, Matt and Cam are a phenomenal crew who do it all. From their Saturday brunch to Tuesday night trivia, they do it all with skill and finesse. Never been disappointed by their seasonal changes to their menu. If there’s a place in this neighborhood to become a regular, it’s here

I can't say enough about the incredible experience our group had at Cafe Skye for our engagement party. Cameron, the owner, made us feel incredibly special from the moment we walked in. The attention to detail and personalized service truly made our celebration unforgettable. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, and the drinks were a hit with all of our guests. Thank you, Cafe Skye, for making our engagement party a day to remember!

Omg amazing. Happy Hour: $4 Beer. $10 Burger. Small, intimate. Good date spot. Really cool bartender Mathew playing super chill music. Waitress Ashley super attentive and detailed. Hidden gem. Go here and then listen to live music at Rockwood Music Hall nearby.

This is a nice and cozy spot in a very high traffic area. The staff are attentive and treat you like a regular, even on your first visit. The atmosphere really they create is typical of older joints in the city, in that they can get everyone conversing with each other, making you feel like a member of the community any time you step in. The drinks, with fresh and often house made ingredients, and delicious food top off this spot as a must see. Stop by for trivia on Tuesday’s and wine flights on Wednesday’s. They only serve natural wine and are knowledgeable on their selections.

Had an absolutely amazing experience. Perfect for a small group gathering or a first date.

The staff was extremely cordial, warm, and attentive. The food selection was a perfect balance between small bites to full course meals.

Furthermore, the specialty cocktail options were amazing. You could tell they were crafted and mixed by a very talented bar staff. The Skyeloma was my favorite!

Not only did my group have a great night, we also had the pleasure of meeting the owner of the cafe whom took the time to sit down and speak to us. We were even presented an aperitif courtesy of the house!

Now on my list of NYC favorites. Definitely recommend.

Thank you for such a great night!

Nothing but great things to say about Cameron and his team. We hosted a birthday party with 23 guests and the space was absolutely perfect for us. Cameron was so easy to work with and everyone had a really awesome time. Can't recommend enough for private events. We will definitely be back!

Amazing scenery, swiftly yet concentrated made drinks, and a homey environment! Tell the bartender what you like, and he makes a custom like drink just for you! Amazing food that I couldn’t stop shoving into my mouth! There’s a really vast selection!

Chris was our server and he was really nice to us. Orange wine was 7/10 but the prosecco was 9/10, really strong. We also got the banana bread and chocolate molten lava cake— both of which were good and served with vanilla ice cream. Cute date night spot

My favorite spot in the east village! It’s neighborhoody and intimate without sacrificing quality. I always get great service and have tried everything on the menu at this point and everything is spectacular. Cocktails are awesome too

A very charming spot with a lovely daily happy hour!

We sat by the bar and enjoyed getting to know the bartenders. The daily happy hour was a nice bonus as they didn't advertise it on the website. Try the whiskey sour; it was so delicious.

Will return again for the food next time!

This gem is hidden on a small street but is filled with perfect cafe food and incredible cocktails. I came in and was able to snag a table without a reservation.

I ordered the brisket sandwich and the meat is insanely tender.

The service was great and the staff was super friendly. I loved it!
Had my daughter’s engagement brunch there and everything was fabulous! Amazing staff and great food and drinks! Highly recommend!
One of the Best places in LES, for sure.\nAlways amazing Drinks, delicious Food and of course the atmosphere!\nThank you, Cafe Skye Team.
Visited to use Summer tippler. Drinks were good. Staff was great! We had desserts. Husband loved banana bread.

Came here for brunch on a whim with two friends and everything was absolutely delicious. Highly recommend the house made sodas and the crab Benedict. Our server was so good and genuinely friendly and helpful. Would absolutely return again. And, it was easy to get a table!
Amazing bar, great food and drinks. Matt is so friendly & talented - highly recommend stopping in!
Great new little gem in Lower East Side! Must visit… also fantastic selection of wine.

We loved this place! Staff were so friendly, food and drinks were excellent, and the vibe was great (also, whoever had control of the playlist was doing a great job). Definitely going to be a go-to date spot for us <3
Such an incredible spot! The food, hospitality and staff were all amazing. Highly recommend for a birthday or special night.
Amazing food burgers a 10 and food is very tasty service is excellent and drinks. If I put up a review it's no BS. I eat out all the time this place is good I'm shocked...

A total gem and great neighborhood spot for visitors and locals alike.

The cafe is on the smaller side and feels very intimate and cozy. They have some really great cocktail selections, with a daily Happy Hour (which is amazing to have compared to most places in NY) from 4-7, and a cool rotating wine flight deal on Wednesdays.

I’ve loved the food that I’ve tried so far, both from the brunch and dinner menu. And the staff is very sweet and attentive. Love this spot!

We happened to walk past this bar and it looked so lovely and welcoming that we went in. Ended up staying for a couple of beers and cocktails, including probably the best old fashioned I’ve ever had. Really nice staff too. Well worth a stop, great drinks, great music, lovely staff.
Want good service and amazing food? This is the place. It's a little small but good lord, they make a damn good drink and amazing food. The staff is so friendly and I will take friends out here too.
Very cozy and chill spot in a hip area. The staff are very kind and friendly. Loved the creative house cocktails! Great place to relax and enjoy a drink with loved ones!
Loved the brisket sliders. The bartender was also very knowledgeable and we were big fans of the sidecar FDR. Highly recommend

The owner is amazing and throws a tibia night every Tuesday that is super fun. Their twist on an espresso martini is so yummy and comes with this piece of truffle gouda that creates a really unique drinking experience. Def recommend!

ABSOLUTELY WONDERFUL IN EVERY WAY!!! My friends and I were trying to find a good place to eat, and we stumbled on this hidden gem!!! The food was AWESOME, from the Tuna Tartare to their wonderful chicken entree! Cameron, the owner, went out of his way to make sure that everything was perfect for us, and our waiter, Matthew,, went above and beyond! I highly recommend this restaurant! Such a pleasant and wonderful surprise! LOVED IT!!

Charming spot in a fantastic location. Staff was very friendly and welcoming. I was in town for the week staying in Lower East Side and ended up coming back here multiple times! Excellent selection of beer and enjoyed the atmosphere. I’ll definitely be coming back next time I’m in town

A MUST hit if you are in the city. A cozy cocktail bar with great vibes and delicious bites. The pretzel bites are to die for but you can’t go wrong with anything on the menu. We paired our food with a light natural wine and they offer a unique rotating selection so we will certainly be back soon!
Excellent food and drink - really nice staff. On weekends surprisingly uncrowded great for an impromptu date night. But Tues is packed for trivia - make a reso!

Came with a group visiting from out of town. Website says they open at 11am for brunch on Saturday. We arrived at 1230pm and they are completely closed.  Not a fan of businesses that waste peoples time like that.
Bartender was very awesome and service was on point. 2nd time visit. customer service was on point.\nShe made the best whiskey sour drinks that got me impressed.\nlovely place.

What a terrific neighborhood place!\nWe had brunch today and the dishes, Crabcake Benedict, Prosciutto Benedict , Shortrib skillet hash and lemon ricotta pancake were wonderful…. Bloody Mary’s, spicy to our taste!! Great place look forward to going back !!!

One of my favorite places to come to since moving to the area last year. Great drinks, great food, great atmosphere, great people here! Favorite drink is definitely the El Manana but you can't go wrong with anything they have. High recommend!
Super cozy spot for drinks! Cool drink menu, very unique and tasty!

This place is classy. Got drinks with a friend who was from out of town to catch up before we go out to a dancy bar later at night. loved the cocktails (I had Skyeloma and the friend got wildflower). Quick bites also seemed delicious.
Such a lovely spot for a drink and bites! The vibe is so great, indoors and out. Cameron was our server all night, and turns out he's the owner! Everything is great here and worth the stop.

The quality and charm at Cafe Skye makes it the diamond of LES. You'll find yourself stopping in for happy hour and staying until the place closes down. The cocktails are excellent and the food is amazing (the burger and the plum shrimp are my go-to)!

A charming oasis from the hustle and bustle of NYC. Service was great and staff is extremely friendly. Cocktail menu is abundant and unique (modern twist on your classic drinks). My go-to spot for date-night!

The true gem of the lower east side. Among the LES’s sea of generic Donnybrooks and Pianos,  Cafe Skye is where you go when you want to feel like your drinking at home. The cocktails and food are fantastic (and criminally underpriced during happy hour). The staff is amazing and ensures that Cafe Skye feels “Cafe Home” every time I drop in (which is quite often).
A gem of the LES!! Perfect for dinner with friends. Also great if you’re only looking for drinks/snacks— tasty cocktails, natural wine, and craft beer galore. Not to mention, the staff rocks!!
Great food and great atmosphere! Both inside at the bar and outside seating are perfect for a night out. Staff/bartenders are very friendly and care about your experience.
Cozy and chill neighborhood bar. Met up with a friend for happy hour drinks. Enjoyable ambiance, easy to chat, friendly and attentive staff, solid french fries, good music. I'll be back.
Such a nice place!! I was just walking by but then I saw it and I was curious to check it out. Great cocktails. Superb service
Hip neighborhood bar with a fantastic kitchen. Make their own vermouths, liquor soaked garnishes, and feature high-end craft spirits at an affordable price.
This is a lovely location for both food and drinks. The house fries and caramelized brussels sprouts with bacon are great appetizers!
Intimate wine and cocktail bar with an awesome weekend brunch!
Excellent nook for great drinks and bites! Cafe Skye is the perfect spot to relax and enjoy top tier hospitality in the city that never sleeps.
Great experience on my first visit to Skye Cafe.  Friendly staff and outstanding cocktails in a laid-back environment with chill music (really good, not overly loud).
Enjoyed my night at the new Cafe Skye! Cocktails are very good and the bartenders and staff are very knowledgeable. Hope to be back soon!
This place is amazing! Great food, creative and delicious cocktails and overall amazing atmosphere. Perfect spot for a date!
the drinks taste great, the food is amazing, the staff are friendly. what more could you ask for??
Tuna burger and fries are great! Menu is super interesting. Will definitely be going back!
Friendly staff, great drinks, delicious food, all in a very cute cafe. We will be back.
Drinks are good, service is terrible.
Great cocktail and apps .. never disappoint. 5 stars for the hosts too!
The cocktails were perfectly curated and the staff was super friendly. Great date spot.
randomly stopped by for a drink.. eclectic cocktails, selective range of beers and wine and inventive food menu.. owner was there and attentive thank you
Great bar and atmosphere, only downside, curly haired bartender is always drunk, sarcastic, and really rude.
Love this place so much! Great bar food and a thoughtfully curated list of natural wines.

The perfect bar in Manhattan
It is small and cozy
The food is delicious
Happy hour prices are super good
Such a cozy spot, great drinks and a wonderful vibe! Good date spot as well
Wonderful hidden gem. Amazing ambiance and a creative menu. Everything we had was top notch.
Fantastic place. Food 10/10. Drinks 10/10. Can’t go wrong
Best bar in NYC. Great cocktails and delicious food. Loved it here!!!
Incredible ambiance and a really creative drinks/food menu. I’ll definitely be visiting Cafe Skye regularly
Excellent, well balanced cocktails. Cameron and Matt are welcoming hosts- cheers dudes!
Great little date spot. Awesome drinks and food. Full kitchen!
Phenomenal environment, gracious hosts, and great drinks. Couldn’t recommend this place more!
Great juicy burgers and a nice selection of beers in a cozy vibe.
Great neighborhood spot with delicious food and a unique wine list that changes regularly.
Trivia night was so much fun and the cocktails are delicious!!
Vibes are high, food is unforgettably good.  Found my new weekly spot.
Excellent food, great service in a very nice setting
Great selection of natural wines, great ambiance.
A cocktail bar with a really great vibe and very kind service!
Cute cozy bar/resto with great food and excellent service
Incredible service and great cocktail drinks!!
The best hidden gem in the lower east side!
Incredible spot - definitely check it out
Incredible service and wine list 💖 …
Wow - great first date spot
Awesome service, great vibe!
Best bar in LES!
Quite the vibe, must stop in LES
Amazing food and drinks!!!
the spot
The cutest place!
This place is a vibe.
Absolutely awesome spot. Great vibe, good people, and the wine is top notch
I like it!!

Urban Backyard is a cozy spot serving up familiar coffee drinks as well off-the-beaten ones plus a selection of baked eats like cakes slices, cookies, and cupcakes. the NoLita coffee shop is a space with a warm interior that is friendly to the eye. filed with plants and elements of  a patio turned into an  inside space, the coffee spot has a unique vibe. stopped here for an iced Americano coffee, last month and was served a tasty brew of coffee providing some cooling relief on a warm afternoon. the staff is amicable and put their efforts into your coffee orders. while the interior seating is limited and there are a few  sidewalk seats, it is a worthwhile stop for anyone who enjoys coffee and wants an escape from the din of NYC.

Cute coffee shop and great service. Our group got a bunch of items- matcha latte and rose almond milk latte + the super cute succulent cupcakes. The cupcakes are small but dense so the size it’s great. We had the the earl grey and lemon …

Came here for a morning Macchiato and loved the detail of including some art. The pastries here are very unique considering they use several plant/tea flavors. The place is very small but you feel just as the name suggests, in a backyard. Very nice decor and great selection of coffee. Will return soon!
Love love love! Especially the atmosphere!\nI’m lucky that I got there when it opened so I was able to find a seat and work! …

Small but cozy place full of beautifully crafted and delightful treats and beverages. The location is tiny so I recommend to take it to-go or if you’re lucky to pass by off peak you may find a place to seat as it’s very limited. I recommend …

Cute mini barnyard hang-out in SoHo! Urban playground is nature cafe upstairs, and cozy, dark barn living room vibes downstairs. Every aspect of this spot feels like a hidden gem. I went on a Saturday at noon and somehow few people were …

This cute hidden gem in Nolita, is comfortable and cozy. It’s a great cafe to get work done, grab breakfast, and enjoy a cup of coffee. The main area is narrow and has limited seating, but a larger working space is available downstairs. …

Tucked away in the vibrant area around Chinatown lies a hidden gem of a cafe, where every visit feels like a whimsical journey into a world of adorable succulent-themed cupcakes and delectable lattes. This enchanting cafe is a sanctuary for …

Favorite coffee shop in the area. Tried their cappuccino and their americano both really good. If you are a coffee lover you gotta try this place! It’s a very tiny charming cafe, they have a few dessert options. Indoor seating is really limited but they do have a few tables outdoors as well!

Atmosphere was the draw.  The coffee was fabulous!  We missed the beautiful cupcakes.  Arrived too early … they serve them after Noon.  Very small inside upstairs but would not be deterred there is also seating downstairs.  The coffee is well worth it!
Green grape drink is so refreshing and yummy!! Loved the black sesame orange chocolate loaf too …

Amazing cafe! Have a great selection of hot and iced coffees and teas. Would highly recommend the Ube latte and the lavender latte. They also have additional seating downstairs which is great for busier days.

The Ube Latte was a unique twist to the traditional latte, and the flavor was enjoyable. The vibrant purple hue was visually appealing, and the initial sips had a delightful balance of sweetness and creaminess. However, as we neared the end …
Walked by this cafe and had to stop in. The ube latte was very good and the cafe itself is so charming. The indoor and outdoor seating is nice and calming in the middle of the city.

Small, lovely cafe. Good coffee with very regular NYC pricing (nothing outrageous, think $7 a latte). Friendly staff. Has WiFi. No restroom.
Absolutely fantastic. The service is great & the coffee, especially the black & tan are amazing. I enjoy every visit & I've been making it a habit to visit more often.
I had the matcha chai latte and loved it.  Very nice coffee shop with lots of variety.  Excellent customer service.

It's like the neighborhood coffee shop. They offer indoor and outdoor seating. People are very friendly. I got their Strawberry matcha latte. It's a nice healthy option because it's just Strawberry puree, ceremonial grade matcha and milk of your choice. They do not add sugar which is great for those who want to control their sugar intake. There's a lot of matcha options and I'm curious about their matcha lemonade so I will be back 😄

It’s a tidy little space on the LES that can seat about eight people so for me it’s more of a grab & go type of place versus sit & chat. They use La COLOMBE beans which never disappoint and the barista was friendly. I definitely recommend and I’ll return. Give them a try.

Best coffee shop on the lower east side, clean, nice and cozy spot. My go to is the vanilla latte or matcha latte and they have delicious pastries if u go early.

It was a warm day and I wanted an iced coffee and ice cream. Well this place has cold brew soft serve, the perfect combination. For $5 I was shocked at the size. They fill up a small coffee cup. Great value! It does taste a little icey than creamy, but I do like it. They have other flavors as well and can do two flavors. They also have a bench and tables on the sidewalk, but I sat inside right by the open window.

The guy there is very rude, I got cappuccino and sat there because it was so hot outside, and by accident, I fell asleep while sitting, the guy told me that if I fall asleep again, he will kick me out, and I should go to Dunkin’ Donuts or anywhere else, I paid 7 dollars for very small cappuccino and got yelled at, never coming back to that place, some people can not talk nicely, I hope nobody comes to that cafe, or you might experience a bad experience.
Favorite lowkey coffee spot in the LES. Great coffee and even better staff/baristas. Everyone who works there is super nice and welcoming.

Loved my matcha chai latte!! Came with a sample of their soft serve ice cream, which was also delicious (especially on a warm day in the sun!). The staff was really helpful in recommending a beverage, as well. They a table inside and a bench outside, and on a nice day it seems they leave the window open for fresh air. Great spot!

There are numerous options available to choose from. They offer a separate menu tailored for matcha lovers, featuring various tastes and flavors. Additionally, they provide at least four latte options, including pumpkin, lavender, vanilla, and caramel.\nAlso they serve soft ice cream.\nI have tried the regular latte but it was good.
Love this little place! Nicest owner and really delicious matcha. Great neighborhood gem.

Loved my lavender latte. I wasn’t sure if I was in the mood for a lavender latte or matcha latte and the barista helped me decide. I had the lavender latte and it was divine. Will have to try the soft serve matcha ice cream next time.
The vegan matcha soft serve was amazing!!

Great neighborhood vibes and good seating for people-watching. The espresso drinks are excellent, but the real stars are the matcha lattes. The hazelnut-matcha latte is one of the best matcha drinks in the city
The vanilla latte and vanilla iced latte (with half and half) were absolutely incredible and second to none. La Colombe coffee beans and the barista is top notch!!

Super cute place with great drink options both your typical cafe drinks like coffe, lattes, matcha, and also refreshing drinks like flavored lemonades. Sugar level and all that customizable which was great, I usually get lemonades or ice tea and they tend to be watered down but this was perfect!! The space is small just about 2 or 3 small round tables so not very spacious.
Vanilla matcha was so so so good

Love this spot. I visited here 3-5 times while I was in the lower east side for work. Best draft oak milk latte ever. It is a small shop but they have 5 small working tables with wifi and plugs. For a small coffee shot that is rare but I worked from their spot for many hours on several occasions. I met one of the partners name Jason. Him and his team of baristas were all great! Only thing I didn't do was take a good photo of the spot!

Really great and friendly local neighborhood place. I really feel welcome here and drinks are great.  Hopefully, more locals will discover this great place. It was my refuge during Covid and now one of my regular haunts ever since.

Deeply disappointed.  They changed their soft serve recipe— now using dairy.  It just tastes like anything else you can get, but sub-par.   The vegan Matcha really used to be something special  (And I’m not even Vegan...) There was a subtle sweetness and had a nice texture, now it’s just a McDonald’s tasting soft serve, couldn’t even finish half of it.\nShould at least have the original version as an option.

Great quality, service, and consistency. It's pretty hard to find cafes that use high quality ingredients especially the matcha. I prefer lattes of both coffee and latte and has a great balance of flavor with quality. They also have soft serve which is good, especially the matcha soft serve.

Came here for a quick beverage and ordered the iced oatmilk latte. The interior was in fact modern than its neighborhood (as we were blocks away from Chinatown). They had a good selection of drinks as well as matcha beverages (i.e.: dirty matcha, matcha soft serve, etc...). My latte was smooth and enjoyable. They also have one table for outdoor seating that fits a maximum of 4 people.
Love this place - coffee is amazing!
Cute place, ice cream looked delicious but the coffee was only ok and the Milk overheated made the cappuccino an overly hot disappointment.  Pain au chocolate seemed from the day before ie dry.
Best coffee place ever! Their coffee is so good that makes me happy all, and they have great service! Their sponge cake is great too!
Nice selection of coffees and matcha, plus some pastries.
Walked in cause I was in the neighborhood and ordered their Passion Fruit Lemonade. It’s amazing!! Definitely coming back! Great service.
This place is very unique, very clean.  Loved their coffee.  And it is not far from him, every morning I get a cup of coffee from them before going back to work!

Super adorable coffee shop filled with flowers. The sitting area is awesome and flowers smell amazing. They also have adorable orange trees. My matcha was delicious and served with nice foam in a cute blue cup. We sat in a comfy area by the window surrounded by orchids. I loved everything about this place.
Such a hidden gem, very friendly staff & such an overall fun vibe! i got the berry matcha & it was so pretty & super tasty. flower coffee shop combos are my favorite and remi did not disappoint!

Must have stop in NYC it's so beautiful and the coffee is such high quality the lavender and the rose latte are what I ordered the food is small pastries and there's small glass houses on the side walk for seating. The flower arrangements are also very pretty.

Amazing coffee! The barista crafts gorgeous latte art with their variety of flavors. I had a rose latte and my girlfriend had the lavender latte. Both tasted amazing, a smooth espresso and the perfect milk to accompany. I would definitely reccomend to visit this amazing place at least once.
Nice coffee shop. Pastries are good, oat milk coffee is delicious, the ambiance is very pleasant.

First of all, this place is SO cute. The drinks are beautiful and taste great. The staff is so friendly and sweet. The only reason I took off one star is because the flower section. The staff for the bouquets was rude and not friendly. But the coffee portion was great.

Beautiful place!
Good Specialty coffee.
